description: Lock Comparative Anatomy Collections to source-backed human-animal anatomical comparison rather than botanical collection lineage.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to Belon's 1555 printed comparison of human and bird skeletons.
Belon's source-backed comparison used printed scientific illustrations with lettered anatomical structures.
Human anatomy and physiology provide the baseline for comparing animal structures and animal models.
Botanical garden and herbarium infrastructure is outside the corrected human-animal comparative anatomy scope.
